---
title: 'Eagle Mountain Intl Church - Newark, TX'
date: '2012-05-24T05:04:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Church Finder'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2792659950925523178'
blogger_filename: '/2012/05/eagle-mountain-intl-church-newark-tx.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Church Finder/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Texas'
---

Eagle Mountain International Church - Newark, TX (Fort Worth Area)<br />
Pastors George and Terri Pearsons<br />
<br />
<a href="http://emic.org/new_here.php">http://emic.org/new_here.php</a>
<br />
<br />
Kenneth Copeland Ministries<br />
Eagle Mountain Intl Church<br />
14355 Morris Dido Road, Newark, TX 76071.<br />
<br />
<br />
Dear Friend,<br />
<br />
What a privilege it is to pastor Eagle Mountain Church. And what a joy it is to be able to tell you what we, as a church, would like to do and be in your life. You see, Eagle Mountain Church is more than just a place of worship. It is a growing, loving family. There are so many great opportunities here to make friends, receive ministry and affect people’s lives with God’s love. There is something here for everyone, and we invite you to take a look and see!
<br />
<br />
Something remarkable happens when you are in the heart of your pastor. That’s why everybody needs a church home and the loving care that only a shepherd can offer. If you are looking for such a place of encouragement and strength, we want to be that church for you.
<br />
<br />
Come on home!
<br />
<br />
Pastor George Pearsons
<br />
<br />
